mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, phone, province, city, district, detail, is_default, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM edu_address WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_address (user_id, name, phone, province, city, district, detail, is_default, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detail}, #{isDefault}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_address SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail = #{detail}, is_default = #{isDefault}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_address SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE edu_address SET is_default = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1
UPDATE edu_address SET is_default = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
